name: cp_ex_multi_anchor_after
drl: rule EX when $a : E0() exists E1(this after[0ms,100ms] $a) then end
comment: post-D-125 fence-sweep witness (2026-07-08): with the not/exists temporal wall lifted, exists x temporal diverges on MULTI-ANCHOR admission order — one exists-blocker admits two E0 anchors; engine fires insertion-order, oracle most-recently-blocked-first (RightTuple.addBlocked prepend analog). 10/450 population rate; the do_existential_node counterpart of the D-125 per-arrival family. Unwalling exists needs its own model-first slab.
